title: Plovdiv、Plovdiv — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Plovdiv、Plovdivの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

PlovdivはPlovdivにある人口346,893の都市です。Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, a 2019 European Capital of Culture with a stunning Roman amphitheater, colorful old town, and thriving arts scene.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
